commands.summary: AttachmentAsyncToken and AttachmentCompletionEvent tests passed, including audio seek generation stamp.

tests_covered: AttachmentAsyncToken carries generation stamp, command id, correlation id, operation kind, and operation key
Audio seek token includes Active generation stamp
Completion event carries non-Unknown completion status
Completion producer enqueue is nonblocking and bounded
allowed_operations_checked: Added token and completion event runtime handling
forbidden_operations_checked: No AttachmentCompletionStatus::Unknown exists in P7D contracts
Audio seek is not represented without GenerationStamp
